prompt: AI Studio Medium shot of a beautiful young woman with long, wavy brown hair picking cherries in an orchard. She is wearing a white summer sundress with a red cherry pattern and tie-up shoulder straps. She wears a wide-brimmed straw sunhat decorated with large, vibrant red fabric poppies. She is holding a small wicker basket filled with fresh red cherries in one hand, while her other hand gently reaches up to touch cherries hanging from a tree branch. Soft, natural morning sunlight, lush green background with blurred cherry trees, cinematic lighting, photorealistic, 8k resolution, highly detailed features.
